text: Archive checkbox in edit aim - available when status is a "halted" status.
description: see data model. some AimStatus have halted: true like done or cancelled. non-halted aims cannot be archived directly.

status.comment: Added an 'Archive this aim' checkbox to AimEditModal, shown only when the selected status is non-ongoing (the v7 equivalent of the aim's 'halted' concept: done/cancelled/failed/unclear; ongoing = open/partially/human-dependent). canArchive computed gates visibility; a watch forces archived=false if status returns to ongoing; handleSave persists archived only when canArchive. Initialized from aim.archived on open. 3 regression tests added (hide/show on status switch, persist on save, force-false on revert); full AimEditModal spec green (13/13), typecheck clean.
